title: Pluribus
overview: The most miserable person on Earth must save the world from happiness.
reason: Highly anticipated with an 87 Metacritic score and an 8.0 IMDb rating from over 127K votes. Created by acclaimed showrunner Vince Gilligan and airing on prestigious Apple TV.

title: HIS & HERS
overview: Two estranged spouses — one a detective, the other a news reporter — vie to solve a murder in which each believes the other is a prime suspect.
reason: A Netflix drama with a strong 7.2 IMDb rating from over 65K votes, featuring a popular cast including Tessa Thompson and Jon Bernthal, indicating high audience engagement.

title: The Beast in Me
overview: A famous author is pulled into a twisted mind game with her rich, powerful new neighbor — who might be a murderer.
reason: This Netflix series boasts a 7.4 IMDb rating from over 61K votes and stars Emmy-winning actors Claire Danes and Matthew Rhys, ensuring significant audience interest.

title: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
overview: A century before the events of Game of Thrones, two unlikely heroes wandered Westeros: a young, naive but courageous knight, Ser Duncan the Tall, and his diminutive squire, Egg. Set in an age when the Targaryen line still holds the Iron Throne and the last dragon has not yet passed from living memory, great destinies, powerful foes, and dangerous exploits await these improbable and incomparable friends.
reason: Part of the globally popular Game of Thrones universe on HBO, created by George R. R. Martin, guaranteeing immense buzz and a 74 Metacritic score.

title: Wonder Man
overview: Simon and Trevor, two actors at opposite ends of their careers, chase life-changing roles.
reason: A Marvel Studios production for Disney+, benefiting from a massive built-in fanbase. It holds a 7.6 IMDb rating with over 12K votes and features Emmy-winning actor Yahya Abdul-Mateen II.
